message:
feat(frankenpandas): re-export MergeExecutionOptions + MergeValidateMode (br-r1k24 / fd90.127)

fd90.127: README's Merge: Advanced Options examples (lines 869-897,
fixed in fd90.113) use:
  MergeExecutionOptions { validate_mode: Some(MergeValidateMode::OneToOne), .. }

Both types are pub in fp_join (crates/fp-join/src/lib.rs:88, 139) but
were missing from frankenpandas's re-export and prelude. A user
copy-pasting from 'use frankenpandas::prelude::*' hits:
  error[E0422]: cannot find struct 'MergeExecutionOptions'
  error[E0433]: failed to resolve: use of undeclared type 'MergeValidateMode'

Fix:
1. Add both to the fp_join re-export at the top of crates/frankenpandas/src/lib.rs
2. Add both to the prelude (in the // Join section, alphabetical neighbours)

Verified:
- cargo build -p frankenpandas — compiles
- cargo test -p frankenpandas --lib — all 5 prelude tests pass

Pure re-export expansion. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
